message:
feat(cli): add --wrap flag to br blocked command

- Add wrap field to BlockedArgs in cli/mod.rs
- Implement --wrap support in blocked.rs for both text and rich output
- Use truncate_title for proper width calculation

Also adds comprehensive e2e test suite (tests/e2e_wrap.rs) covering:
- list, show, ready, search, comments, blocked commands with --wrap
- JSON output unchanged with --wrap flag
- Edge cases: narrow/wide terminals, unicode content, empty databases

Closes beads_rust #25 wrap flag implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1273,6 +1273,10 @@ pub struct BlockedArgs {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub detailed: bool,
 
+    /// Wrap long lines instead of truncating in text output
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub wrap: bool,
+
     /// Filter by issue type (can be repeated)
     #[arg(long = "type", short = 't')]
     pub type_: Vec<String>,
